mapper.select:
select campaign_no, campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_goal_member, to_char(campaign_start_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_start_date, to_char(campaign_expire_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as campaign_expire_date from create_campaign_tbl where campaign_status in (2,3,4)
and campaign_title like '%' || #{campaignTitle} || '%'

select campaign_title, campaign_status, campaign_goal_member, campaign_start_date, campaign_expire_date, (select count(*) from campaign_member_tbl where campaign_no=#{campaignNo})as member_count from create_campaign_tbl ct where campaign_no = #{campaignNo}
mapper.insert: insert into create_campaign_tbl values ( campaign_no_seq.nextval, #{campaignTitle}, #{campaignExplanation}, 0, #{campaignGoalMember}, #{campaignExpireDate}, #{memberId}, null )
